records.title: Verified op-amp drive and stability choices
records.blocker: Existing op-amp record is placeholder-level and lacks output-drive, load, bandwidth, and stability evidence for headphone or power-amplifier front ends.
evidence_needed: datasheet-backed output current and load limits

records.title: Class A/Class AB output devices
records.blocker: Headphone-class MMBT3904/MMBT3906 output-device seeds and selector checks exist, but SOA, dissipation, thermal coupling, and power-device evidence are not verified.
evidence_needed: datasheet-backed current and power ratings beyond the headphone seed
symbol-footprint pinmap beyond seeded SOT-23 records

records.title: Class AB bias network
records.blocker: A diode-string Class AB headphone output-stage block can be realized, but quiescent-current calculation, temperature compensation, Vbe multiplier support, and layout-coupled thermal evidence are not verified.

records.title: headphone_output_protection block
records.blocker: Active fault protection, speaker/bridge/power-amplifier load safety, and fabrication promotion remain unverified for headphone output protection.
evidence_needed: KiCad-backed ERC/DRC validation of protected Class AB headphone examples
SOA and thermal proof for selected output devices
speaker, bridge, and power-amplifier load-safety constraints

records.title: Thermal and high-current layout constraints
records.blocker: Layout rules exist as evidence hooks but are not proven on amplifier output stages with real KiCad DRC-clean boards.
evidence_needed: KiCad DRC artifact with semantic hash or git object ID

records.title: Feedback, decoupling, and stability layout
records.blocker: Op-amp feedback and decoupling evidence exists in tests, but broader analog stability placement and routing constraints are not promoted.

records.title: KiCad-backed amplifier promotion
records.blocker: Amplifier KiCad-backed fixture is expected_fail and blocks before fabrication-candidate evidence.

records.title: Amplifier design limits for AI generation
records.blocker: AI-facing diagnostics now describe supported Class AB headphone output-stage assumptions, but power-amplifier limits and KiCad promotion requirements still need broader examples.
evidence_needed: safe request examples for dual-rail and single-supply headphone outputs
